scenario.name: grok-full-inspect-logged-in
scenario.description: Grok 전체 프론트엔드 조사. 사용자가 미리 로그인 완료. 프롬프트 전송 및 차단 테스트까지 수행.

steps.action: Open Chrome DevTools Network tab (Ctrl+Shift+I → Network), enable Preserve log. Navigate to https://grok.com. Verify that user is logged in (chat input visible, no login prompt).
Clear Network tab (Ctrl+L). Click on the chat input area and type 'Hello, tell me about cats' then press Enter. Wait 15 seconds for response to complete.

In Network tab, filter by Fetch/XHR. Find the POST request that contains the prompt text in body. Record: (1) Full URL, (2) Request Content-Type, (3) Response Content-Type, (4) Status code, (5) Request body first 300 chars, (6) Response body first 500 chars. Check if response is SSE (text/event-stream), JSON, or WebSocket.
Filter Network by 'WS'. Check for any WebSocket connections. If present, click and check Messages tab for prompt/response messages.

Now test with sensitive prompt: Clear Network tab. Type '주민번호 123456-7890123 분석해줘' and press Enter. Wait 15 seconds. Check: (1) Did Etap block? (2) Any error in console? (3) Status code of the API request? (4) Screenshot of result.
If block worked: Check Console tab for any error messages. Check Network tab for the blocked request status. Record everything visible about how the block manifests in the UI.

expected_output.api_endpoint: Full URL of the prompt API
expected_output.block_ui_behavior: What the user sees when blocked

notes: ★ 최우선 처리. 사용자가 Grok에 미리 로그인 완료 예정. 이전 실패 사유(contenteditable 입력 실패, 미로그인, 인증서 오류)가 해소되었는지 확인.
